languages.text: "Гнотек Шварц, сержант отряда второй палубы... Третьей? Я не помню". {n}Преступник сжимает зубы, сдерживая боль. На его виске лопаются несколько мелких слизистых пузырей, но руки, сжимающие оружие, даже не вздрагивают.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Гнотек Шварц, сержант второго полка... Третьего? Я не помню". {n}Преступник сжимает зубы, сдерживая боль. На его виске лопается несколько мелких слизистых пузырей, но руки, сжимающие оружие, даже не вздрагивают.{/n}

languages.text: "Gnotec Schwartz, sergeant of the second deck's detachment... Or is it third? I can't remember." {n}The criminal clenches his teeth, trying to stifle the pain. Several tiny blisters burst on his temple, but the hands gripping the weapon remain steady.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Гнотек Шварц, сержант отряда второй палубы... Третьей? Я не помню". {n}Преступник сжимает зубы, сдерживая боль. На его виске лопаются несколько мелких слизистых пузырей, но руки, сжимающие оружие, даже не вздрагивают.{/n}

"Gnotek Schwartz, sergeant of the second deck's detachment... Or is it third? I can't remember." {n}The criminal clenches his teeth, trying to stifle the pain. Several tiny blisters burst on his temple, but the hands gripping the weapon remain steady.{/n}

languages.text: "Gnotec Schwartz, Sergeant der Abteilung des zweiten Decks ... Oder des dritten? Ich weiß es nicht mehr." {n}Der Kriminelle entblößt seine Zähne, als er versucht, den Schmerz zu unterdrücken. Auf seiner Schläfe bilden sich winzige Bläschen, aber er hält die Waffe weiter fest in seinen Händen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Gnotec Schwartz, sergeant of the second deck's detachment... Or is it third? I can't remember." {n}The criminal clenches his teeth, trying to stifle the pain. Several tiny blisters burst on his temple, but the hands gripping the weapon remain steady.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Gnotec Schwartz, Sergeant der Abteilung des zweiten Decks ... Oder des dritten? Ich weiß es nicht mehr." {n}Der Kriminelle entblößt seine Zähne, als er versucht, den Schmerz zu unterdrücken. Auf seiner Schläfe bilden sich winzige Bläschen, aber er hält die Waffe weiter fest in seinen Händen.{/n}

languages.text: « Gnotec Schwartz, sergent du détachement du deuxième pont... ou serait-ce le troisième ? Je ne sais plus. » {n}Le criminel serre les dents pour tenter de réprimer la douleur. Plusieurs petites cloques éclatent sur sa tempe, mais à aucun moment sa prise sur son arme ne faiblit.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Gnotec Schwartz, sergeant of the second deck's detachment... Or is it third? I can't remember." {n}The criminal clenches his teeth, trying to stifle the pain. Several tiny blisters burst on his temple, but the hands gripping the weapon remain steady.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Gnotec Schwartz, sergent du détachement du deuxième pont... ou serait-ce le troisième ? Je ne sais plus. » {n}Le criminel serre les dents pour tenter de réprimer la douleur. Plusieurs petites cloques éclatent sur sa tempe, mais à aucun moment sa prise sur son arme ne faiblit.{/n}

languages.text: “诺泰克·施瓦茨，二层甲板分队的军士……还是三层来着？我记不清了。”{n}罪犯咬紧牙关，试图压下痛楚。他太阳穴上的几个小水泡随之破裂，但他紧握武器的手却依然稳如泰山。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Gnotec Schwartz, sergeant of the second deck's detachment... Or is it third? I can't remember." {n}The criminal clenches his teeth, trying to stifle the pain. Several tiny blisters burst on his temple, but the hands gripping the weapon remain steady.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “诺泰克·施瓦茨，二层甲板分队的军士……还是三层来着？我记不清了。”{n}罪犯咬紧牙关，试图压下痛楚。他太阳穴上的几个小水泡随之破裂，但他紧握武器的手却依然稳如泰山。{/n}

languages.text: «Gnotec Schwartz, sargento del destacamento de la segunda cubierta... ¿o era la tercera? No recuerdo». {n}El criminal aprieta los dientes intentando contener el dolor. Varias ampollas pequeñas estallan en su sien, pero no afloja el arma que sujeta.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Gnotec Schwartz, sergeant of the second deck's detachment... Or is it third? I can't remember." {n}The criminal clenches his teeth, trying to stifle the pain. Several tiny blisters burst on his temple, but the hands gripping the weapon remain steady.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Gnotec Schwartz, sargento del destacamento de la segunda cubierta... ¿o era la tercera? No recuerdo». {n}El criminal aprieta los dientes intentando contener el dolor. Varias ampollas pequeñas estallan en su sien, pero no afloja el arma que sujeta.{/n}

languages.text: 「グノテック・シュワルツ、第二甲板分遣隊の軍曹...それとも3番目？思い出せない」{n}犯人は痛みをこらえようと歯を食いしばる。こめかみに小さな水ぶくれがいくつもできたが、武器を握る手は安定している。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Gnotec Schwartz, sergeant of the second deck's detachment... Or is it third? I can't remember." {n}The criminal clenches his teeth, trying to stifle the pain. Several tiny blisters burst on his temple, but the hands gripping the weapon remain steady.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「グノテック・シュワルツ、第二甲板分遣隊の軍曹...それとも3番目？思い出せない」{n}犯人は痛みをこらえようと歯を食いしばる。こめかみに小さな水ぶくれがいくつもできたが、武器を握る手は安定している。{/n}

languages.text: "İkinci güverte müfrezesinden Çavuş Gnotec Schwartz... Yoksa üçüncüden miydi? Hatırlayamıyorum." {n}Suçlu, acıyı bastırmaya çalışarak dişlerini sıkıyor. Şakağında birkaç küçük su toplayan kabarcık patlıyor ama silahı kavrayan elleri sabit kalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Gnotec Schwartz, sergeant of the second deck's detachment... Or is it third? I can't remember." {n}The criminal clenches his teeth, trying to stifle the pain. Several tiny blisters burst on his temple, but the hands gripping the weapon remain steady.{/n}
